message:
fix: Enable status updates in technical-doc-writer update-issue

Agent was trying to close issues but update-issue didn't have status: enabled

files.patch:
@@ -43,6 +43,7 @@
 #   create-pull-request:
 #   add-comment:
 #   update-issue:
+#     status:
 # ```
 #
 # Job Dependency Graph:
@@ -7267,7 +7268,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f98dfc5c65a23a2325f34cd # v8
         env:
           GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT: ${{ env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT }}
-          GH_AW_UPDATE_STATUS: false
+          GH_AW_UPDATE_STATUS: true
           GH_AW_UPDATE_TITLE: false
           GH_AW_UPDATE_BODY: false
           GH_AW_WORKFLOW_NAME: "technical-doc-writer"

@@ -20,6 +20,7 @@ safe-outputs:
   create-pull-request:
   add-comment:
   update-issue:
+    status:
 ---
 
 # Technical Documentation Writer
